name: Shell Layout (CP Theme)
description: Complete application shell layout for CP theme with FloatingNav

usageGuidance.when: Building application shell for CP (Customer Portal) theme
antiPatterns: Don't use ShellFooter with CP theme - use FloatingNav instead
Don't mix CP and non-CP navigation patterns
Don't omit ShellHeader - it's required for CP theme

notes.cpSpecific: CP theme uses FloatingNav (bottom navigation) instead of ShellFooter
notes.sidebarVariants: LeftSidebar and RightSidebar are optional based on app needs
notes.themeRule: This pattern is CP-specific - do not use with other themes
notes.pageHeaderActionsOrder: When ShellPageHeader is used, place secondary/outline actions left and primary action right; DOM order in the pageHeaderActions slot is the visual order.

examples.name: CP with left sidebar
examples.description: CP layout with collapsible left sidebar

examples.name: CP minimal
examples.description: Minimal CP layout with header and floating nav only
